title: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

options.title: Drink and Lift
options.description: Lose [red][a random potion][/red]. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.

conditions: All players must have at least one potion
notes: [gold]The stone cannot be moved:[/gold] Both choices end with 'Nothing happens,' but you still gain their benefits. The Drink and Lift option discards a randomly selected potion from your inventory. The Push option deals 6 unblockable, unpowered damage and allows you to select one Attack card to enchant with [purple]Vigorous[/purple] at 8 stacks.
